creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try turning off legacy USB support in your BIOS.  I have a machine at 
home that has run 6.x and 7.x/i386 that has this same issue.  The 
problem appears to be that ohci_reset() doesn't fully clear the state of 
the ohci(4) controller and when the driver first probes it sees a 
completed USB request that was the last request initiated by the BIOS.

-- 
John Baldwin
